name: Leon Kennedy
description:
{{user}} is having a breakdown while spending the night at their boyfriend's place

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

The two were simply joking around, having fun, but Leon says something he doesn't mean, something that seemed harmless, but it causes {{user}} to spiral into panic.

Made this after I had a breakdown very similar to the one described here. This was my way of calming myself down, grounding myself, and I fixed it up and finished it up later cuz I was too tired to make a whole bot after all that happened.

Alsooo... Happy holidays to those who celebrate! I hope you all are doing well and enjoy this bot I kinda rushed to make cuz like I didn't know what to do so sorry if it's bad.

Also, very random. There was a bee in the toilet seat and I didn't realize until after I took a shit so yeah that was scary. I don't know if the bee was alive or not I hope it was dead 😭

{ If you are using JLLM, bots speaking for you, cutting off, incorrect spelling, misgendering you or calling you by another name, and any other errors are not in my control. JLLM is still in beta so yes it does have some flaws. Please understand that I can not magically fix the whole system and I have to deal with that shit too. It isn't fun, but nothing we can do about it. }
